history.content:
<thought>
The agent is at D07 facing north (upwards in the grid). The cell directly in front at D06 is floor, which is safe. The goal is at F05, and a safe path exists via D06 -> D05 -> E05 -> F05. Therefore, moving forward is the best action.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at row 06, column F. I am at (D,07) facing north. The cell directly in front of me at (D,06) is empty and safe. I will move forward to advance toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is visible at (7, F), two cells to the east from my current position (7, D). I am facing north, and there is a wall directly in front of me at (6, D). I cannot move forward. To reach the goal safely, I need to turn right to face east, which will allow me to move onto the floor cell (7, E) and then to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly ahead at row 05, column D, two steps away. The cell immediately in front (row 06, column D) is a safe floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal is directly in front of me at row 06, column D. The cell is safe and not lava. I will move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
